raw_title: Google’s latest Pixel drop allows Gemini to order groceries for you and more
raw_content: Google is adding several new features to Pixel phones with its latest March update, including the ability for its Gemini AI assistant to do things for you, like order groceries or book a ride. This feature, which was first shown off during Samsung's Unpacked event last week, is rolling out now to the Pixel 10, […]
